calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Continued To Oct-31-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Brett Reichman'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Eric R. Fleming, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Ann Delgado, CSR#11185.

Matthew R. Harrison, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Brett Reichman sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendants Clyde Beswick, Jason Chang, and CB1 Gallery, LLC,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Damages: $11,113.20
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,309.23
Attorney's Fees: $18,259.75
Costs: $979.60
Total Judgment in the amount of $31,661.78

Judgment signed in open court.

Plaintiff Brett Reichman'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
